title: Define demo observability capture policy and guardrails
description: Document and implement the demo-only observability contract: full payload capture is explicitly allowed for this feature, including sensitive auth data, but must stay clearly scoped to demo environments. Define what gets captured, labeling/red-banner expectations in the UI/API, retention expectations, and operational boundaries so downstream schema, instrumentation, and UI work can build on a single policy.
close_reason: Implemented demo-only full-payload observability policy in code and UI capture behavior

title: Validate TanMock source user on TAN setup
description: Prevent TAN broker logins from failing with 'Unknown source Keycloak user' by validating the configured source user when a TAN entry is created in TanMock admin, and surface a clear error in the admin flow instead of a later 500 during login.

title: Fix bootstrap tofu flow binding
description: Correct the Keycloak OpenTofu browser flow bindings in infra/tofu/keycloak/main.tf so bootstrap_app uses the bootstrap device flow and browser_app uses the interactive step-up flow, then verify convergence in the compose runtime.
close_reason: Corrected swapped Keycloak browser flow bindings and verified OpenTofu converges with no changes in the compose runtime.

title: Bootstrap SSO redirect to webmock does not create reusable browser SSO session for subsequent webmock login
description: Discovered while validating auth-sandbox-2-lj8m: after bootstrap SSO redirects to webmock, the browser SSO session is not reusable for a later direct webmock login. Investigate session and cookie propagation so webmock can reuse the established browser SSO session.

title: Fix failing E2E smoke tests for appmock device login UI drift
description: Investigate and fix the currently failing E2E smoke tests discovered while validating auth-sandbox-2-2rbf. Focus on appmock device login UI assertion drift so the smoke suite matches the current device-login UI behavior again without broadening scope beyond the minimal test or UI fix needed.

title: Harden login_token single-use validation
description: Update the Keycloak extension to validate login_token exp and jti and enforce single use with Keycloak's existing single-use capability instead of a custom store. Keep behavior aligned with the bootstrap flow's replay-protection requirements.

title: Fix broken authenticated appmock desktop layout
description: The recent appmock density changes broke the authenticated desktop layout: large blank areas appear on the left and the right column is split awkwardly. Restore a stable balanced desktop layout with less scroll, but without overlapping or empty panels.

title: Investigate and fix 500 errors in device login and trace UI after restart
description: Investigate recurring HTTP 500 errors affecting device login and the trace UI after service restart, identify the root cause, implement a fix, and verify behavior after restart.

title: Fix failing smoke tests after token/session UI cleanup
description: Fix the current failing smoke tests introduced after the token/session UI cleanup. Current failures include admin save flow bearer token expectations and the missing secure element prompt after password setup in the device login flow.
close_reason: Closed accidental duplicate created while marking the smoke test fix issue in progress.

title: Fix failing smoke tests after token/session UI cleanup
description: Fix the current failing smoke tests introduced after the token/session UI cleanup. Current failures include admin save flow bearer token expectations and the missing secure element prompt after password setup in the device login flow.

title: Harden flow bootstrap endpoint
description: Require an existing Keycloak user token for step_up and account_upgrade flow creation, keep anonymous registration bootstrap minimal, and add or update E2E coverage plus docs so the demo remains intact.

title: Secure remaining sensitive API endpoints
description: Protect the remaining sensitive auth-api and trace-api endpoints with token-based access checks and remove public access to trace internal routes where possible.

title: Split device-login app work for acr 2se and SMS-TAN alignment
description: Move the existing device-login app work into its own bead. This covers making the current app consistently receive acr 2se and keeping the app-side SMS-TAN interaction aligned with the new browser flow.

title: Add browser mock web with 1se/2se Keycloak flow
description: Create a separate frontend app for Keycloak browser login. The new mock web app should request acr 1se on initial login, offer a dedicated step-up path to acr 2se, and call mock backend APIs that distinguish 1se vs 2se access. Also make the existing device-login app consistently receive acr 2se.

title: Projekt auf aktuellen Flow reduzieren
description: Bestehende Daten in DBs und Keycloak loeschbar machen, ungenutzte UI/Backend/Extension-Teile identifizieren, Migrationsskripte zusammenfassen und das Projekt auf die aktuellen Flows verschlanken. Vor jeder Loeschaktion explizit Rueckfrage an den Nutzer stellen.

title: Implement reusable registration identity matching for code or SMS TAN
description: Implement registration identity matching with either a pre-issued code or SMS TAN using separated person, code, and SMS TAN data. Design the matching methods so the same approach can later be reused for browser step-up flows.

title: Browser-Step-up ueber Keycloak Authenticator und Redeem-Mechanismus integrieren
description: Integriere den Browser-Step-up gemaess ADR ueber einen normalen OIDC Authorization Request mit acr_values, einen Keycloak Custom Authenticator und serverseitiges Redeem eines One-Time result_code beim auth-api. Ziel ist Session-Upgrade mit aktualisiertem acr/amr/auth_time ohne Vertrauensdaten ungeschuetzt ueber den Frontchannel zu transportieren.
notes: Implemented the browser result_code redeem path: new ResultCodeAuthenticator plus factory/service registration, dedicated browser-app client and browser-step-up-flow in Keycloak tofu config, auth-api browser step-up start endpoint that finalizes a step_up flow into finalization.kind=result_code, and auth-api internal redeem endpoint for backchannel validation. Extension builds; auth-api tests/lint pass.

title: E2E-Tests fuer Registrierung und Step-up ueber die neue Flow-Architektur erweitern
description: Erweitere die End-to-End-Tests so, dass Registrierung, Browser-Step-up und Mobile- bzw. Grant-basierter Session-Aufbau ueber die neue generische Flow-Architektur abgedeckt sind. Die Tests sollen insbesondere Finalize, Redeem, Session-Upgrade, Idempotenz und die beibehaltenen Device-Login-Konzepte absichern.
notes: Expanded E2E coverage in e2e/tests/smoke.spec.ts with a live-runtime generic flow test covering registration create/start(code)/complete/finalize plus SMS step_up finalize and internal result_code redeem. Full Playwright suite passes against rebuilt runtime containers.

title: Datenmodell und Persistenz fuer generische Assurance-Flows im auth-api implementieren
description: Implementiere das persistente Flow-Modell im auth-api fuer registration, account_upgrade und step_up. Umfasst Schema/Tabellen bzw. Persistenzlayer fuer flowId, purpose, status, targetAssurance/requestedAcr, deviceId, userHint/prospectiveUserId, methodenspezifische Zwischenergebnisse, TTL, Idempotency, Audit-Events sowie Grundlagen fuer Locking bei finalize.
design:
First PR slice: land only the persistence/data-model foundation for generic flows inside auth-api, without public endpoint migration or Keycloak integration yet.

Add the core flow aggregate and storage for flowId, purpose, status, requestedAcr/targetAssurance, deviceId, userHint/prospectiveUserId, resolved userId, encrypted-challenge binding, expiresAt, finalizedAt and a version/lock field for safe finalize transitions. Persist extensible method state plus idempotency/audit data so registration and step_up can share the same model.

Include repository APIs and transactional semantics for create/load/update/finalize-lock, plus placeholders for finalization artifacts (result_code or assurance_handle) and TTL cleanup rules. Keep the slice implementation-oriented and testable at repository/schema level before adding the public API in auth-sandbox-2-rms.
notes: Implemented the auth-api assurance-flow persistence foundation plus artifact storage: migrations 002/003, generic flow row types, full internal assurance-flows module with repository helpers, finalize lock, artifact issuance/redeem support, and transition tests. auth-api tests and lint pass.

title: Keycloak Custom Grant fuer Mobile Step-up und Session-Reuse implementieren
description: Implementiere in Keycloak einen eigenen OIDC Grant Type fuer das Redeem eines kurzlebigen assurance_handle aus dem auth-api. Der Grant soll den Client authentisieren, den Handle serverseitig beim auth-api validieren, Subjekt/acr/amr/auth_time uebernehmen und daraus eine normale Keycloak-Session plus Tokens fuer mobile Registrierung/Step-up aufbauen.
notes: Implemented the Keycloak-side assurance_handle redeem path: new AuthApiClient in the extension, AssuranceHandleGrantType plus factory/service registration, auth-api internal redeem endpoint, and auth-api mobile step-up completion endpoint that finalizes a step_up flow and exchanges the resulting assurance_handle for normal Keycloak tokens. Extension builds; auth-api tests/lint pass.

title: Bestehenden Registrierungsflow auf die generische Flow-Engine migrieren
description: Migriere den bisherigen Registrierungsablauf auf die neue generische Flow-Engine im auth-api. Die Finalisierung soll erst am Ende ueber Keycloak entscheiden, ob ein User existiert oder neu angelegt wird, Credentials aktualisieren und falls noetig das Passwort ueber die Admin API setzen. Bestehende Device-Login-Pflichtkonzepte wie die verschluesselte Challenge muessen erhalten bleiben.
notes: Migrated the existing registration path onto the shared generic flow engine: /api/device/register now runs through purpose=registration via create/start(code)/complete(code)/finalize under the hood, preserving backend-controlled Keycloak user/credential/password behavior and the encrypted challenge/device-login model. Verified by auth-api tests/lint and full Playwright runtime suite.

title: Oeffentliche generische Flow-API im auth-api bereitstellen
description: Implementiere die oeffentliche Flow-API im auth-api gemaess Architekturentscheidungen: POST /flows, GET /flows/{flowId}, method start/complete und finalize. Beruecksichtige Flow-Token, erlaubte Schritte, Statuspruefungen, Idempotenz und ein erweiterbares Methodenmodell statt verfahrensspezifischer Endpoints.
design:
First PR slice: expose the minimal public generic flow contract on top of the persisted model from auth-sandbox-2-7k8.

Provide shared endpoints for POST /flows, GET /flows/{flowId}, method start/complete actions and finalize. Requests/responses should use one common API model: flow metadata, purpose, status, requested assurance/acr, allowed next actions, method summaries and a finalization descriptor instead of registration- or step-up-specific endpoint shapes.

Finalize must return a typed result that callers can branch on cleanly: finalization.kind=assurance_handle for backchannel/custom-grant redeem and finalization.kind=result_code for browser redeem. Enforce flow token checks, state-machine validation and idempotency here, while leaving concrete registration and step-up behavior to follow-on slices.
notes: Expanded the first public generic flow API slice in auth-api beyond create/get: added POST /api/flows/:flowId/methods/:method/start, POST /api/flows/:flowId/methods/:method/complete, POST /api/flows/:flowId/finalize, and internal artifact redeem support. Existing device registration now uses the shared registration flow engine under the hood while preserving current endpoint behavior. auth-api tests and lint pass.

title: Generische Flow-API und Keycloak-Grant-Struktur fuer Registrierung und Step-up umsetzen
description: Setze die in REGISTRATION_STEPUP_DESIGN_NOTES.md und ADR_REGISTRATION_STEPUP_ARCHITECTURE.md beschriebene Zielarchitektur um: auth-api als persistente generische Flow-Engine fuer registration, account_upgrade und step_up; Keycloak als Session-/Token-System mit Browser-Redeem und Mobile-Custom-Grant. Dieses Issue buendelt die eigentliche Implementierung und dient als Parent fuer die konkreten Umsetzungsbeads.
design:
Target architecture: auth-api owns a persistent generic assurance-flow engine for purpose=registration, account_upgrade and step_up, while Keycloak remains the session/token system. The auth-api exposes one shared flow contract (create/read/method start/method complete/finalize), persists flow state and method progress, and decides purpose-specific finalization only at the end.

Each flow record should carry flowId, purpose, status, requestedAcr/targetAssurance, subject hints, device/challenge context, method state, idempotency/audit data, TTL and finalize locking. Finalize returns a typed artifact instead of bespoke endpoints: browser-capable flows produce finalization.kind=result_code for one-time redeem, mobile/backchannel flows produce finalization.kind=assurance_handle for server-to-server redeem.

Registration maps onto the same engine with username=userId, encrypted challenge and credential concepts preserved, and backend-controlled password setup through the Keycloak Admin API when no password exists. Browser step-up uses acr_values plus a Keycloak authenticator that redeems result_code over backchannel; mobile step-up uses a custom grant that redeems assurance_handle and can build/reuse a session from refresh-token-based context.
close_reason: Child implementation beads completed and verified

title: Fix custom Keycloak device-login grant token compatibility
description: Fix the custom Keycloak device-login grant so issued tokens work with Keycloak userinfo and introspection and the browser login flow completes successfully. Reproduced failure: POST /api/device/login/finish returns 500 because Keycloak userinfo/introspection fails with token id format 'ofrtdlg:...' and DefaultTokenContextEncoderProvider expects token id length 6.
close_reason: Fixed custom grant token-id shortcut so userinfo/introspection and browser login succeed

title: Fix device-binding login start 500
description: Investigate and fix the 500 error on POST /api/device/login/start when logging in with an existing saved device binding, then verify the device-binding flow again.

title: Restart stack, run tests, validate flows
description: Restart the auth-sandbox-2 stack, run the full test suite, validate key device-login flows with DevTools, fix any issues found, rerun verification, and document/close the work item.

title: PostgreSQL catalog corruption breaking trace detail endpoints
description: Observed PostgreSQL runtime/catalog corruption errors include `missing chunk number 0 for toast value ... in pg_toast_2619` and `could not access status of transaction ... pg_subtrans`. Local runtime trace detail requests like `GET /traces/:id` fail intermittently with 500s and need investigation/remediation.
close_reason: Fixed migration race with advisory lock, restored auth-api startup, and verified trace detail endpoints plus E2E

title: podman compose up -d startup fails with dynamic fs require in auth-api and trace-api
description: Fresh podman compose up -d fails because auth-api and trace-api exit with Error: Dynamic require of "fs" is not supported from packages/backend-core/dist/index.js. Reproduce from clean startup and fix backend-core bundle or runtime behavior so both services start successfully.

title: Investigate Podman Compose postgres startup failure
description: Investigate and fix the Podman Compose startup failure where the postgres container exits during podman compose up.

title: Investigate Podman Compose postgres startup failure
description: Investigate and fix the Podman Compose startup failure where the postgres container exits during podman compose up.
close_reason: Auf Wunsch des Users vorerst beendet.

title: Fix trace-api CORS for app-web device login
description: Device login currently fails because app-web cannot POST client trace events to https://trace.localhost:8443/client-events due to browser access control checks. Reproduce the failing preflight/response, fix trace-api/Caddy/runtime config, and verify device login plus smoke coverage.
close_reason: Verified same-origin /trace-api proxy fixes device login client-event delivery; targeted smoke coverage passes

title: Fix missing traces after backend split
description: Newly performed logins no longer appear in the trace viewer after the trace backend split. Investigate trace ingestion, persistence, and viewer loading so fresh traces are stored and visible again.
close_reason: Verified fresh login traces persist and display correctly; fixed stale smoke coverage to require the current run trace.

title: Expose trace explorer API endpoints from auth-api
description: Add backend endpoints for the trace explorer, including GET /traces, GET /traces/:id, GET /spans/:id, plus any natural supporting endpoints needed for artifact retrieval, filtering, and decoded detail views backed by the observability schema.
close_reason: Implemented auth-api trace explorer endpoints for listing traces, viewing trace details, and span/artifact inspection

title: Build React trace explorer UI
description: Implement the browser UI for observability exploration: trace list, trace detail, span detail, and artifact viewer with decoded/explained payload presentation and clear demo-only sensitive-data messaging.
close_reason: Implemented the admin React trace explorer UI with trace, span, and decoded artifact views

title: Add E2E coverage for demo trace explorer
description: Extend end-to-end coverage for the new observability feature per repository rules. Validate that representative auth/device flows produce traces that can be inspected via the explorer UI/API, including decoded artifacts and sensitive demo data visibility expectations.
notes: Code and E2E additions are in place, but the full runtime-dependent trace explorer validation still needs end-to-end verification against a running stack.
close_reason: Completed with successful runtime Playwright E2E verification against the running local stack.

title: Instrument auth-api for incoming and outgoing trace spans
description: Add auth-api instrumentation for inbound requests and outbound calls so the login/device flow emits correlated traces and spans into the observability store. Include propagation hooks needed for downstream capture and explorer visibility.
close_reason: Instrumented auth-api requests and service spans with trace capture

title: Build decoders and field explainers for trace artifacts
description: Implement reusable decoding and explanation logic for trace artifacts and fields, including JSON, base64/base64url, JWT, and encrypted challenge payloads. Persist or derive field explanations so the explorer can show both raw and human-readable interpretations.
close_reason: Implemented artifact decoding and field explanation pipeline for demo trace explorer

title: Capture and decode Keycloak interactions in observability pipeline
description: Record auth-api to Keycloak interactions as observable artifacts/spans and decode request/response content enough to inspect the device login flow. Scope includes preserving raw demo data plus normalized decoded views for later explorer use.
close_reason: Implemented Keycloak interaction capture and decoded observability artifacts for the device login flow

title: Add Postgres observability schema for traces, spans, artifacts, and field explanations
description: Create the central observability data model in Postgres for the trace explorer feature. Cover traces, spans, artifacts, and field_explanations with relationships, indexing, and migration strategy suitable for demo browsing and decoding/explanation use cases.
close_reason: Added observability schema migration for traces, spans, artifacts, and field explanations

title: Demo trace explorer / observability umbrella
description: Plan and deliver a demo-only trace explorer / observability capability for the auth sandbox. Scope includes explicit full capture of sensitive data for demo purposes, Postgres-backed observability storage, auth flow instrumentation, decoding/explanations, trace explorer APIs, React UI, and end-to-end coverage.
notes: Most implementation scope is complete in code (auth-api APIs, Keycloak capture, frontend propagation, admin trace explorer UI). Leaving umbrella open until runtime-dependent E2E validation is fully verified and final optional scope is explicitly resolved.
close_reason: Umbrella observability feature complete, including Caddy/proxy capture and verified local Playwright E2E coverage.

title: Consolidate PostgreSQL into single instance with separate schemas
description: Consolidate the current two PostgreSQL databases into one PostgreSQL instance/database while keeping Keycloak and auth-api isolated via separate schemas. Update the relevant runtime/configuration assumptions for the new database layout.
close_reason: Implemented single Postgres setup with separate schemas.

title: Investigate pnpm e2e Playwright failure: Cannot add property metadata, object is not extensible
description: Investigate and fix the standalone Playwright failure from pnpm e2e where the run aborts with Cannot add property metadata, object is not extensible. Determine whether the root cause is the recent credential metadata/date handling fix, the test harness, or runtime wiring, and restore a passing standalone e2e run.

title: Fix invalid credential creation date handling
description: Investigate and fix the bug where credential creation dates are invalid in the Keycloak custom credential flow. Ensure created credentials persist a valid creation timestamp and the runtime/auth flow no longer produces bad credential metadata.

title: Manage Keycloak realm, clients, scopes, and auth flows with OpenTofu
description: Add OpenTofu-based Keycloak configuration for the realm, clients, client scopes, and authentication flows where provider support exists. Run OpenTofu via a dedicated Docker Compose service, store its state in a persistent compose volume rather than git, and leave only the custom credential/authenticator implementation in the Keycloak extension.
design: The intended local integration is a compose-managed OpenTofu runner that applies Keycloak config against the local stack. OpenTofu state is runtime data kept in a persistent compose volume, not versioned files in the repo.
close_reason: Keycloak-Konfiguration laeuft ueber OpenTofu im Runtime-Stack mit persistenter State-Volume.

title: Implement minimal Keycloak extension for custom credential/authenticator
description: Build only the Keycloak extension/provider pieces that cannot be expressed through standard configuration: the custom credential and authenticator required for the encrypted challenge device flow. Keep realm, clients, scopes, and supported auth-flow wiring out of the extension and managed through OpenTofu; capture the required integration points for the auth-api and local runtime.

title: Encrypted challenge device login flow
description: Implement the credential-based device login flow with encrypted challenge creation, persistence, and verification while keeping Keycloak relevant.

title: Merge TAN admin into Admin Web
description: Consolidate TAN broker administration into the existing Admin Web so operators can manage registration identities and TAN entries in one place, including assigning TANs to existing users.

title: Add TanMock broker to homepage
description: Update the homepage so the TAN Mock OIDC identity broker is represented in the overview and Mermaid diagrams, including any homepage E2E coverage that should reflect the broker flow.

title: Homepage-Diagramme auf Kernabläufe reduzieren
description: Die Diagrammbeschreibungen auf der Homepage sollen vereinfacht werden. Hinweise auf Traces, UI-Darstellung, decodierte Claims und ähnliche Darstellungsdetails sollen aus allen Diagrammen entfernt werden, damit nur die fachlichen Kernabläufe übrig bleiben.

title: Homepage-Alle Diagrammtexte detaillieren
description: Alle Homepage-Sequenzdiagramme sollen fachlich präziser und detaillierter beschrieben werden. Die Schritttexte sollen den echten Implementierungen in Frontend, auth-api, Keycloak-Extension und Tracing folgen, nicht nur allgemeine Zusammenfassungen liefern.

title: Homepage-Flowbeschreibungen fachlich präzisieren
description: Die Detailtexte der Homepage-Sequenzdiagramme sollen fachlich präziser werden. Insbesondere beim Device-Login soll klar beschrieben werden, wie die Signatur geprüft wird und gegen welche gespeicherten Daten die Verifikation läuft.

title: Homepage-Mermaid-Schrittzahlen lesbar machen
description: Die autonummerierten Schrittzahlen in den Mermaid-Sequenzdiagrammen auf der Homepage haben zu wenig Kontrast. Die Darstellung soll so angepasst werden, dass die Zahlen klar lesbar sind.

title: Homepage-Diagramme lesbarer machen
description: Die Mermaid-Diagramme auf der Homepage sind mit den langen Notiztexten schwer lesbar. Die Diagramme sollen visuell klarer werden, während der detaillierte Ablauf weiterhin auf der Homepage sichtbar bleibt.

title: Homepage-Mermaid-Diagramme detaillieren
description: Die Diagramme auf der Homepage sollen weiterhin mit Mermaid gerendert werden. Die vorhandenen Ablaufdiagramme sollen inhaltlich detaillierter ausgearbeitet werden.

Add a Keycloak-protected admin UI to manage TAN entries and map each login to a new brokered Keycloak user with username/userId prefix 'tan_' plus the configured userId. title: Bootstrap SSO soll 2se erst beim Step-Up nutzen
description: After AppMock bootstrap SSO to WebMock, the first manual WebMock login should still result in 1se. The stronger SSO session from AppMock should only be consumed when WebMock later requests step-up to 2se, and that step-up should complete without additional user input.

title: Bootstrap SSO soll 2se erst beim Step-Up nutzen
description: After AppMock bootstrap SSO to WebMock, the first manual WebMock login should still result in 1se. The stronger SSO session from AppMock should only be consumed when WebMock later requests step-up to 2se, and that step-up should complete without additional user input.

title: SSO login_token soll ACR uebertragen
description: Beim Bootstrap-SSO von AppMock nach WebMock soll der im aufrufenden AppMock-Token erreichte ACR ueber den login_token an Keycloak uebergeben werden, damit WebMock bei SSO direkt mit dem bestehenden Assurance-Level startet statt auf den normalen 1se-Browserpfad zurueckzufallen.

title: SSO Copy soll Launch-URL statt Ziel-URL kopieren
description: appmock-web currently offers copying the target URL, but the intended behavior is to copy the bootstrap SSO launch URL that establishes the SSO cookie in the new browser and then redirects to the target page.

title: 2se wird nicht beim SSO uebernommen
description: Waehrend des Bootstrap-SSO bzw. App-to-Web-Handoffs wird die staerkere 2se-Assurance auf der Zielseite nicht beibehalten.

title: Improve Keycloak trace attribution
description: Improve tracing inside Keycloak so requests and internal calls show clearer origin context in the trace output, especially for flows where the current spans do not reveal which browser/client/authenticator triggered the call.

title: Add E2E coverage for bootstrap SSO flow
description: Add or extend automated tests to cover bootstrap browser SSO into mockweb, requested ACR handling, callback redirect behavior, and subsequent normal login that succeeds via the established Keycloak SSO cookie.

title: Integrate appmock SSO bootstrap launch
description: Wire appmock UI to request the bootstrap authorization URL and open the resulting browser/webview flow for mockweb. Keep the initial target integration focused on mockweb/browser-app only and preserve the existing device-login experience.

title: Handle bootstrap callback and redirect target
description: Implement the auth-api callback that receives the bootstrap authorization response, redeems the code server-side, verifies the signed state, and redirects the browser to the allowlisted target path so the target app can authenticate via the Keycloak SSO cookie.

title: Implement auth-api SSO bootstrap launch endpoint
description: Add the auth-api endpoint that starts the browser SSO bootstrap flow from an authenticated app session. Validate the requested target and requested ACR (1se or 2se), mint the signed state, and orchestrate the bootstrap handoff without PKCE.

title: Submit PAR bootstrap request to Keycloak
description: Implement the PAR call from auth-api to Keycloak using the SSO bootstrap client and login_token. Carry the signed state and requested ACR, rely on the agreed non-PKCE client flow, and return the authorization URL needed by the caller.

title: Add bootstrap target registry and signed state
description: Implement auth-api support for an allowlisted bootstrap target registry, initially only mockweb/browser-app, plus a signed short-lived state carrying targetClientId, targetPath, requestedAcr, exp, and jti. Keep validation strict so later steps can trust target selection and replay-protection inputs.

title: Implement PAR-based Keycloak SSO bootstrap for dynamic web targets
description: Add a generic Keycloak browser SSO bootstrap flow that starts from the authenticated app session, uses PAR plus login_token to create a real browser SSO session, supports dynamic allowlisted target web clients, redeems the bootstrap authorization code server-side, and then redirects to the target app so it can authenticate normally via the Keycloak SSO cookie. Include replay protection via short-lived signed state and single-use login_token jti handling.

title: Clean up local runtime files for push
description: Review currently uncommitted local runtime files, commit only safe repository changes, and push the result to GitHub.
close_reason: Ignored local-only artifacts and credential files, then committed the cleanup metadata

title: Lock appmock-web secure prompt overlay scroll
description: Make the appmock-web secure prompt overlay viewport-bound and lock background scrolling while the prompt is open.
close_reason: Secure prompt compacted and overlay scroll locked

title: appmock-web secure prompt compactness
description: Reduce vertical space in the appmock-web secure prompt so the mobile dialog needs less scrolling and fits more comfortably on shorter viewports.
close_reason: Secure prompt compacted and overlay scroll locked

title: Refine appmock-web authenticated desktop layout
Fix appmock-web desktop sidebar clipping
description: Fix the appmock-web desktop registration layout so the left sidebar hero and status text are no longer clipped when the desktop sidebar becomes too narrow.

title: Fix appmock-web desktop sidebar clipping
description: Fix the appmock-web desktop registration layout so the left sidebar hero and status text are no longer clipped when the desktop sidebar becomes too narrow.

title: Polish appmock-web desktop layout
description: Refine the appmock-web desktop login layout after visual feedback that the current two-column login state looks unattractive, especially because the sidebar hero heading is too dominant.
close_reason: Desktop layout polished and visually re-verified

title: appmock-web visual verification and remaining layout fixes
description: Visually verify the latest appmock-web desktop and mobile layouts, identify any remaining layout or spacing issues, and implement the minimal frontend fixes needed for a stable, coherent UI.
close_reason: Visual verification completed; no further layout fixes needed

title: Redesign appmock desktop layout balance
description: The current appmock desktop layout leaves too much empty vertical space in the left column and forces scrolling into the middle of the page before useful content stays visible. Rework the app-shell into a more stable top-anchored dashboard layout with a persistent left summary rail and better balanced desktop composition while keeping mobile behavior intact.

title: Tighten appmock layout density
description: The appmock UI feels visually unbalanced with too much empty space on the left, too much stacked information on the right, and excessive scrolling. Rework the responsive layout so the main sections are denser, better balanced, and require less vertical scrolling on desktop while preserving mobile usability.

title: Clarify registered-vs-authenticated appmock copy
description: The current appmock UI makes stored device data feel too similar to an authenticated session. Update the copy so it clearly distinguishes device registration from active login/session state before and after the secure prompt.

title: Hide sensitive appmock verification data behind secure prompt
description: After registration code verification and during the secure identity prompt, the underlying verification data remains visible in the blurred background. Canceling the prompt also leaves the user on a screen that still exposes prior registration data. Update the appmock UI so secure prompts mask sensitive content and cancel returns to a safe visible next state.

title: Fix blank appmock screen after code verification
description: After entering the registration code in appmock, the UI can end up with a stored device and no visible next action. Investigate the transition after registration verification and ensure the user always lands in password setup, auto-login, or a visible recovery state.

title: Auto-login after successful device registration
description: After appmock completes device registration successfully and no password step is required, automatically continue into device login so the user immediately receives tokens instead of only seeing a stored device binding.
close_reason: Auto-login now starts after successful device registration

title: Remove remaining upfront service selector from served appmock UI
description: The running AppMock UI still shows the upfront registration service selector. Trace where the served UI still references 'Bevorzugter Service' and remove it so service selection only happens after flow creation.

title: Move registration service selection to verification step
description: AppMock should not ask for a preferred registration service before the registration flow exists. Remove the upfront service selector from the first step and let service selection happen only in the verification step after flow creation.
close_reason: Moved registration service selection to verification step

title: Fix appmock registration verification UX
description: AppMock registration verification does not show the SMS-TAN in the demo UI, the person-code input feels duplicated/confusing, and registration flow errors need clearer inline feedback. Update the registration verification UX and extend E2E coverage.
close_reason: Fixed appmock registration verification UX and added coverage

title: Rename remaining generic flow observability labels
description: Replace remaining generic flow trace types, operation names, and related references with neutral or concrete assurance-flow naming so the codebase and observability output match the concrete registration and step-up create APIs.
close_reason: Renamed remaining generic flow observability labels to assurance-flow naming

title: Update docs and diagrams for concrete flow APIs
description: Review and update all repository documentation and diagrams to reflect concrete registration and step-up flow creation APIs and internal services. Replace outdated generic create flow references while keeping post-create service selection and follow-up endpoints accurate.
close_reason: Updated docs and diagrams for concrete registration and step-up flow APIs

title: Make assurance flows concrete internally and externally
description: Replace the generic flow creation/orchestration API with purpose-specific flow APIs and internal services so registration and step-up flows use concrete request models and concrete lifecycle functions. Keep service selection after flow creation and preserve existing registration/device-login behavior, updating tests accordingly.
close_reason: Implemented concrete registration and step-up flow creation APIs and services

title: Bug: decode flowToken in trace inspector flow response artifact
description: The trace inspector currently does not decode the flowToken field in the flow response artifact. Create a bug issue to track adding decoding so the artifact view exposes the decoded token data for debugging.

title: Fix trace inspector detail layout
description: Detailansicht im Trace-Inspector ist im Layout kaputt; Karten und Inhalte ueberlagern sich. Ursache analysieren, minimale UI-Korrektur implementieren und relevante Checks ausfuehren.

title: Projektweite Umbenennung der Mock-Apps
description: Benennt app-web in appmock-web, mock-web in webmock-web und mock-api in servicemock-api im gesamten Projekt um, inklusive Referenzen, Routen, Paketnamen und Doku.

title: Homepage-Sequenzdiagramme aktualisieren
description: Aktualisiert die bestehenden Sequenzdiagramme auf der Homepage und ergänzt fehlende Auth-Flows mit neuen Diagrammen.

title: Simplify trace artifact display
description: Render each trace artifact section as a single readonly multiline JSON text field instead of a property tree.

title: Replace trace tree copy actions with scrollable readonly value fields
description: Replace per-node copy actions in the trace tree with scrollable readonly multiline value fields for long values and improve JSON/properties display.

title: Improve trace artifact UI contrast and compact layout
description: Improve the trace artifact UI with clearer contrast and a more compact layout for easier scanning and readability.

title: Clean up trace tree width/layout for long token wrapping
description: Adjust the trace tree width/layout so long token values wrap cleanly instead of making artifact sections too wide.

title: Make raw-vs-decoded comparison panels opt-in in interactive trace tree
description: Make raw-vs-decoded comparison panels in the interactive trace tree opt-in instead of always open by default.

title: Clean up decoded trace comparison UI
description: Clean up the trace comparison UI so decoded nodes no longer show confusing or ugly raw-token comparison panels.

title: Simplify trace inspector artifact access within selected span
description: Keep the existing trace-to-span selection flow, but simplify navigation inside a selected span so artifacts are faster and more directly accessible.

title: Add interactive tree view for trace artifacts
description: Add an interactive tree view to trace artifact raw/decoded/decrypted sections with expand/collapse, copy actions, and raw-vs-decoded comparison per field.

title: Fix trace UI decoded-vs-raw comparison ignores JSON key ordering
description: Update the trace comparison so decoded-vs-raw JSON objects that differ only by key ordering are treated as equivalent, preventing false differences in the UI.

title: Remove envelope-specific labels from trace UI
description: Remove envelope-specific labels from the trace UI and hide the decoded section when it matches the raw data.

title: Fix trace viewer artifacts for POST /api/device/login/finish
description: Fix missing response headers and missing decoded data for POST /api/device/login/finish artifacts in the trace viewer.

title: Polish trace viewer readability for nested decoded/decrypted token display
description: Improve trace viewer readability for nested decoded/decrypted token display in the trace viewer, especially for nested decoded/decrypted token sections.

title: Token display needs nested decode/decrypt support for query/form/JSON body values
description: Support nested decode/decrypt handling so query parameters, form values, and JSON body values are shown in the decoded and decrypted token sections.

title: Final simplification sweep after 232df9c
description: After commit 232df9c, do one last simplification pass: remove more redundant code, tighten duplicated helpers, and keep only short inline explanations where they still add value.

title: Additional simplification pass
description: Remove redundant abstractions, collapse duplicated helpers, and clarify remaining domain-specific behavior inline where useful.

title: Additional simplification pass
description: Remove redundant abstractions, collapse duplicated helpers, and clarify remaining domain-specific behavior inline where useful.

title: Audit obsolete leftovers after token/trace flow changes
description: Audit the codebase for obsolete leftovers after recent token/trace flow changes, remove unnecessary code, simplify related implementations, and document unclear domain terms inline where helpful.

title: Split app-web token view into session and inspection sections
description: Split the app-web token view into separate session and inspection sections and remove unused requiredAction handling.

title: Propagate session-critical vs display-only token field separation across codebase
description: Carry the separation between session-critical token fields and token-display-only fields through all relevant code paths, types, and call sites so runtime auth decisions never depend on display-only data.

title: Separate token-display-only response fields
description: Separate or clearly mark token response fields that are only needed for token display so login and registration flows do not depend on them.

title: Annotate shared trace types in packages/shared-types/src/index.ts
description: Add type annotations for the shared trace types exported from packages/shared-types/src/index.ts.

title: Annotate data transmitted only via traces
description: Add comments or annotations in the code for all data that is only passed via traces.

title: Threat analysis for auth sandbox architecture
description: Document the current trust boundaries, exposed entrypoints, abuse scenarios, and mitigations for device login, flow bootstrap, proxy-protected routes, internal redeem paths, and trace/admin surfaces in the current auth sandbox architecture.

title: Clarify public flow endpoint docs
description: Document what public means for POST /api/flows and related device endpoints, and explain how /api/flows could be protected or constrained in the future without breaking the demo.

title: Update Mermaid diagrams for auth hardening
description: Update existing Mermaid architecture/flow docs and add new diagrams if needed so they reflect the removal of the public browser step-up shortcut and the new auth protections for auth-api and trace-api while preserving demo flows.

title: Remove public browser step-up shortcut endpoint
description: Delete the unused public /api/step-up/browser/start endpoint and related code so browser step-up only runs through the Keycloak internal flow.

title: Admin-web user creation does not work
description: Creating new users from admin-web currently fails. Investigate and fix the admin-web user creation flow.

title: Create reusable local test user in auth sandbox runtime
description: Create a reusable local test user 'test' with password 'test' in the auth sandbox runtime.

title: Research Keycloak browser flow step-up placement
description: Praktisches Keycloak-Pattern fuer Step-up mit bestehender Session und conditional-level-of-authentication sowie result-code-authenticator recherchieren; Empfehlung zur Platzierung im Browser-Flow ableiten.

title: Research Keycloak LoA Terraform support
description: Pruefe fuer dieses Repository, ob der verwendete Keycloak Terraform/OpenTofu Provider die Konfiguration der Execution-Configs fuer den Built-in-Provider 'conditional-level-of-authentication' unterstuetzt, inklusive benoetigter Felder und Fallback-Ansatz.
close_reason: Obsolete or already satisfied by current repo state

title: Add README-ready Mermaid sequence diagram for current end-to-end flow
description: Add a Mermaid sequence diagram suitable for the README that documents the current end-to-end flow.
close_reason: Added a README-ready Mermaid sequence diagram for the current end-to-end flow.

title: Add README-ready Mermaid sequence diagram for current end-to-end flow
description: Add a Mermaid sequence diagram suitable for the README that documents the current end-to-end flow.
close_reason: Auf Wunsch des Users vorerst beendet.

title: Document flow endpoint protections and verify assurance_handle
description: Document the new flow endpoint protections, live-verify the mobile assurance_handle path, and prepare the requested git commit.
close_reason: Documented endpoint protections, live-verified the mobile assurance_handle path, and created the requested git commit.

title: Protect redeem flow with Keycloak service-account auth
description: Protect /api/internal/flows/redeem with Keycloak service-account bearer tokens, update the Keycloak extension caller to use that authentication, and add/extend tests for the secured flow.
close_reason: Protected internal flow redeem with Keycloak service-account bearer tokens, updated the Keycloak extension caller, and added test coverage.

title: Implement flow-token protection on public flow API and update tests
description: Add flow-token protection to the public flow API and update the relevant tests to cover the protected behavior.
close_reason: Implemented signed flow-token protection for public flow endpoints and updated automated tests.

title: Remove clearly unnecessary files from current solution
description: Identify and remove files that are clearly unnecessary while preserving anything still used by the app, runtime, or tests.
close_reason: Removed disposable runtime artifacts and tightened ignore rules for generated runtime log archives.

title: Lokale Mock-SMS-Methode fuer die generische Flow-Engine bereitstellen
description: Implementiere fuer die neue generische Flow-Engine im auth-api eine lokale bzw. dev-taugliche Mock-SMS-Methode zum Starten und Abschliessen eines SMS-basierten Schritts. Es geht ausdruecklich nicht um die Anbindung eines echten SMS-Providers, sondern um eine test- und entwicklungsfreundliche Simulation inklusive klarer API-/Methodenintegration und nachvollziehbarem Verhalten fuer lokale Flows.
notes: Implemented a local mock SMS method on the generic flow engine via /api/flows/:flowId/methods/sms/start and /complete. It returns masked target plus a devCode for local development and was exercised in the new generic flow E2E. Verified by auth-api tests/lint and full Playwright runtime suite.

title: Alte verfahrensspezifische Registrierungs- und Step-up-Endpunkte aufraeumen und abkuendigen
description: Raeume nach erfolgreicher Migration alte spezialisierte Endpoints und verfahrensspezifische Pfade auf, markiere sie als deprecated oder entferne sie, und passe interne Aufrufer sowie Dokumentation an die generische Flow-API an. Dabei duerfen keine fuer den Device-Login fachlich notwendigen Konzepte verloren gehen.
notes: Deprecated the legacy specialized registration endpoint path by adding an explicit deprecation response header on POST /api/device/register while keeping behavior intact. Registration now uses the shared generic flow engine internally; existing UI/device-login behavior remains compatible.

title: Codebeispiel fuer Keycloak Custom Grant zeigen
description: Erarbeite ein konkretes Codebeispiel fuer einen Keycloak Custom Grant fuer Mobile Step-up mit assurance_handle und bestehender Session.

title: Fix Keycloak config auth flow cleanup
description: Investigate and fix keycloak-config failures during stack startup where authentication flow deletion returns 'Cannot remove authentication flow, it is currently in use'. Ensure realm provisioning becomes idempotent without startup errors.
close_reason: Made keycloak-config migration idempotent and removed legacy browser-flow cleanup failures

title: Migrate device login flow to custom OAuth grant
description: Track migrating the repository's device login flow from the current implementation to a custom OAuth grant while preserving the encrypted challenge and Keycloak credential-based backend flow.

title: ADR fuer Registration und Step-up Architektur anlegen
description: Leite aus den Session-Notizen ein Architecture Decision Record fuer Registrierung, Account-Upgrade und Step-up mit Keycloak ab.

title: Dokumentiere Session-Ergebnisse zu Registration und Step-up
description: Erstelle eine Markdown-Zusammenfassung der Session als Grundlage fuer spaetere Architektur- und API-Designs rund um Registrierung, Account-Upgrade und Step-up mit Keycloak.

title: Restrict trace DB writes to trace-api
description: Move direct trace database writes out of shared libraries so only trace-api performs trace DB write operations.

title: Refine tab CSS styling
description: Adjust the authenticated tabs styling again because the first readability fix still does not look right. Keep the behavior unchanged and improve the visual treatment of the tab labels and states.

title: Fix unreadable tabs
description: Investigate the UI tabs that are currently hard to read and implement the minimal styling change needed to make tab labels legible again.

title: Vervollstaendige deutsche App-Web-Texte und Material-3-Tabs

title: Lokalisiere Android-Tabs und staerke Material-Look

close_reason: Tabs auf Deutsch gestellt und Material/Android-Look verstaerkt

title: Fuehre Android-Tabs fuer Tokens und Mock API ein
description: Die Trennung zwischen Token-Bereich und Mock-API soll in app-web ueber eine Android-artige Tab-Navigation klarer werden. Ein Tab zeigt Session-Tokens, der andere die Mock-API, ohne Labels oder Flow-Semantik zu aendern.
close_reason: Android-Tabs trennen Tokens und Mock API im app-web klar voneinander

title: Baue app-web neu fuer sichtbare Mock-API-UI-Aenderungen
description: Die Quelltexte fuer die Mock-API-UI wurden geaendert, aber app.localhost serviert apps/app-web/dist ueber Caddy. Das Frontend muss neu gebaut werden, damit die UI-Aenderungen sichtbar werden.
close_reason: app-web neu gebaut damit Mock-API-UI-Aenderungen ueber Caddy sichtbar sind

title: Staerke visuelle Trennung des Mock-API-Panels
description: Der Mock-API-Bereich in app-web wirkt trotz Auslagerung noch zu aehnlich zum Token-Bereich. Das UI soll visuell deutlicher als eigener API-Bereich erscheinen, ohne bestehende Labels oder das Verhalten zu aendern.
close_reason: Mock-API-Panel visuell als eigener API-Console-Bereich ausgearbeitet

title: Entkopple Mock-API von Token-Anbindung in app-web
description: Die Anbindung der Mock-API in app-web ist unuebersichtlich. Die API-Anbindung soll von der Token-Verwaltung getrennt werden, mit minimaler Umstrukturierung und passenden Tests/Anpassungen.
close_reason: UI trennt Mock-API visuell von Token-Bereich

title: Add mock-api backend with OIDC/JWKS protected endpoints, app-web integration, and tracing
description: Add a new mock-api backend with OIDC discovery/JWKS support and audience-protected REST endpoints, integrate it minimally into app-web, and include tracing support so the flow can be exercised and observed end to end.
close_reason: Created accidentally as duplicate during workflow setup; using auth-sandbox-2-nyb instead.

title: Add mock-api backend with OIDC/JWKS protected endpoints, app-web integration, and tracing
description: Add a new mock-api backend with OIDC discovery/JWKS support and audience-protected REST endpoints, integrate it minimally into app-web, and include tracing support so the flow can be exercised and observed end to end.

title: Investigate podman compose down network in-use message
description: Investigate why podman compose down reports 'Network auth-sandbox-2_default Resource is still in use' and determine any required cleanup or fix.

title: Split trace backend into its own app
description: Trace runtime code currently still lives under apps/auth-api even though it runs as a separate service. Create a real apps/trace-api backend with its own package/build wiring, move trace-specific server code there, update compose/workspace/runtime integration, and keep auth-api focused on auth concerns.
close_reason: Created a real apps/trace-api app and extracted shared runtime code into backend-core

title: Decide tracking for .beads/dolt-monitor.pid.lock
description: The repository currently tracks an empty .beads/dolt-monitor.pid.lock even though related runtime pid files are ignored. We intentionally left this tracked lockfile untouched while fixing same-origin /trace-api proxy routing in auth-sandbox-2-iyb. In a dedicated cleanup change, decide whether this file should stop being tracked and/or whether ignore rules should be adjusted to better reflect intended runtime artifacts.
close_reason: Stopped tracking .beads/dolt-monitor.pid.lock and added it to .beads/.gitignore as a local runtime lockfile

title: Separate trace backend from admin/device-login backend

title: Polish split admin and trace UI

title: Split admin UI into separate registration and trace viewer apps
description: Split the current admin UI so registration/device binding and the trace viewer become separate applications, preserving the existing device-login-focused flow while isolating these concerns into distinct apps.

title: Add search for admin code and device lists
description: The admin overview now has better structure, but registration codes and devices still need local search fields so long lists are easier to scan.

title: Redesign admin overview layout

title: Simplify trace detail hierarchy and improve readability

title: Reduce trace list overflow in admin browser

title: Fix deep inspection timestamps and heading

title: Fix challenge artifact exp display in admin trace detail
description: Observability display bug: in the admin trace detail view, the challenge artifact raw/decrypted view still shows expiresAt instead of exp. Epoch values should display with an inline timestamp comment so raw/decrypted challenge data is easier to inspect.

title: Fix challenge artifact exp display in admin trace detail

title: Improve admin trace browser UX

title: Split overloaded admin trace explorer into two pages

close_reason: Verified consolidated Postgres setup with build, config, and E2E tests.

title: Playwright auf vertrautes lokales HTTPS ohne Ignore-Flag umstellen
description: Passe die E2E-Konfiguration auf das neue lokal vertraute Caddy-Zertifikat an, so dass  nicht mehr noetig ist, und verifiziere die Tests mit echtem TLS-Vertrauen.
close_reason: Node-Requests koennen das lokale Root-CA nutzen, aber Playwright-Browser akzeptiert das lokale TLS noch nicht ohne Ignore-Flag; Tracking abgeschlossen mit dokumentiertem Ist-Zustand.

title: Festes Caddy-Zertifikat fuer Browser-Vertrauen einrichten
description: Ersetze das bisherige dynamische lokale Caddy-Zertifikat durch ein festes Zertifikat/CA-Setup und registriere das Vertrauen so, dass Browser die lokalen HTTPS-Hosts ohne Warnung akzeptieren. Beruecksichtige die benoetigten Projektdateien und die lokale Browser-/System-Vertrauenskonfiguration.
close_reason: Festes lokales Caddy-Zertifikat eingerichtet, CA vertraut und HTTPS erfolgreich ohne Warnungs-Bypass verifiziert.

title: Keycloak-Konfig nur beim Start mit Retry ausfuehren
description: Den keycloak-config-Service so umbauen, dass er die OpenTofu-Keycloak-Konfiguration nur beim Containerstart ausfuehrt, bei Fehlern retryt und nach erfolgreichem Apply beendet statt dauerhaft im Loop zu laufen.
close_reason: Keycloak-Konfig laeuft nur beim Start mit Retry und beendet sich nach erfolgreichem Apply; Podman-kompatibel verifiziert.

title: Homepage-Bundle-Impact der Mermaid-Integration reduzieren
description: Die Mermaid-Integration auf der Startseite so optimieren, dass der Bundle-Impact sinkt; bevorzugt den Mermaid-Renderer lazy laden, ohne dass Sequenzdiagramme kaputtgehen.
close_reason: Mermaid wird fuer die Startseite lazy geladen und die Diagramme bleiben funktionsfaehig.

title: Startseiten-Sequenzdiagramm durch ansprechendere Mermaid-Darstellung ersetzen
description: Die aktuelle Visualisierung der Homepage-Sequenz durch eine ansprechendere Mermaid- oder Mermaid-basierte Diagrammdarstellung ersetzen; notwendige Frontend-Anpassungen und Test-Updates einschließen.
close_reason: Startseite nutzt jetzt eine ansprechendere Mermaid-Darstellung und ist verifiziert.

title: Startseiten-Flowtext durch visuelles Sequenzdiagramm ersetzen
description: Den aktuellen beschreibenden Text des Homepage-Flows durch eine echte visuelle Sequenzdiagramm-Darstellung ersetzen, nicht nur durch Text. Alle dafür nötigen Verifikations- und Testanpassungen mit umsetzen und prüfen.
close_reason: Startseite zeigt jetzt ein tatsaechliches visuelles Sequenzdiagramm.

title: Startseiten-Flow-Erklärung als klares Sequenzdiagramm darstellen
description: Die aktuelle Flow-Erklärung auf der Startseite soll durch eine verständlichere Darstellung im Stil eines Sequenzdiagramms ersetzt werden. Dazu gehört auch, notwendige E2E-Tests für die neue Präsentation zu ergänzen oder bestehende E2E-Abdeckung anzupassen.
close_reason: Startseite zeigt die Flows jetzt als klares Sequenzdiagramm und ist verifiziert.

title: Runtime-Container nach Observability-Cleanup neu starten und prüfen
description: Lokale Runtime-Container nach dem Observability-Cleanup neu starten und verifizieren, dass der Runtime-Stack weiterhin funktioniert.
close_reason: Runtime nach Cleanup neu gestartet und erfolgreich verifiziert.

title: Observability-Services und Infrastruktur-Konfig entfernen
description: Entferne Compose-/Caddy-/Runtime-Konfigurationen und sonstige Infrastrukturartefakte, die ausschliesslich fuer lokale Observability benoetigt werden, einschliesslich Grafana, Tempo, OpenTelemetry Collector und verwandter Service-Verkabelung.

title: App-seitige Observability-Instrumentierung und Konfiguration entfernen
description: Entferne Tracing-, Logging-Korrelation- und Telemetrie-Konfigurationen in Anwendungen und Services, soweit sie nur der Observability dienen. Dazu gehoeren insbesondere OpenTelemetry-Initialisierung, Exporter-Konfiguration und observability-spezifische Umgebungsvariablen.

title: Observability-Altlasten aus Repository entfernen
description: Gesamttask fuer das Entfernen aller Komponenten, Konfigurationen und Verweise, die nur fuer lokale Observability vorgesehen sind. Umfasst Infrastruktur, Instrumentierung sowie Dokumentation/Tests/Runtime-Wiring fuer Grafana, Tempo, OpenTelemetry Collector und aehnliche Bausteine.

title: Add auth-api tracing and log correlation
description: Instrument the Node/TypeScript auth-api with OpenTelemetry or a comparable minimal setup so inbound requests, downstream calls, and failures are traced and linked to structured logs. Propagate trace context through the main auth flows and expose enough metadata to debug who called whom and where errors happened.
close_reason: Durch neuen Rueckbau-/Cleanup-Plan fuer Observability ueberholt.

title: Add local observability stack in compose
description: Add a minimal local observability stack to Docker Compose so traces, logs, and service relationships are visible in one local UI. Prefer an OpenTelemetry-based setup with a collector plus a UI that can correlate traces and logs for the demo stack.
close_reason: Durch neuen Rueckbau-/Cleanup-Plan fuer Observability ueberholt.

title: Display token claims after device login
description: Add the post-login UI and E2E coverage to show the important token claims after a successful encrypted-challenge device login. Keep it minimal but explicit for demo/debugging: userId/username, subject, roles, and token expiry information.
close_reason: Explizite Claim-UI und E2E-Pruefungen nach Device-Login umgesetzt.

title: Stabilize auth API contract and shared types
description: Extract a minimal shared contract for registration, login, token refresh, logout, and token-claim display so auth-api and the React frontends agree on payloads and claim shapes. Keep it lightweight, TypeScript-first, and suitable for E2E assertions.
close_reason: Gemeinsamer TypeScript-Vertrag und Shared Types sind in API und Frontends umgesetzt.

title: Implement refresh and logout flow
description: Add the missing refresh-token and logout path across auth-api and the React app so a logged-in device session can renew tokens and terminate cleanly. Include E2E coverage for refresh success, logout success, and invalid or expired session handling.

title: Define auth database schema and migrations
description: Create the concrete database schema and migration workflow for the auth-api, covering the minimal persisted state for device registration, encrypted challenges, and session-related records. Keep the schema small but explicit so downstream login and session flows do not invent storage ad hoc.
close_reason: DB-Schema und Migrations-Workflow fuer den Minimal-Flow sind umgesetzt.

title: README and SETUP documentation
description: Add the required project documentation for auth-sandbox-2: README.md and SETUP.md with the minimal stack, device-login flow, backend-controlled password step after registration, encrypted challenge flow, and local startup instructions for Docker/Podman Compose. Include the concise project description and the workflow diagram content needed for the landing page so the UI and docs stay aligned.

title: Device registration and password-set flow
description: Implement backend-driven device registration plus the post-registration password check and set-password flow via the Keycloak Admin API.

title: App-web, admin-web, and E2E coverage
description: Build the minimal React frontends for admin and device flows, including a lightweight homepage/landing page with the most important links into the app, a short project description, and a visual summary of the main auth flows. Add end-to-end tests for registration, password setup, login, and the landing-page navigation that matters for the demo.

title: Auth API skeleton with DB and config
description: Bootstrap the Node/TypeScript auth-api with config loading, database wiring, and the initial layered application structure.
close_reason: Auth-API-Skeleton mit Konfig, DB-Wiring und Basisstruktur ist umgesetzt.

title: Docker Compose, Caddy, Postgres, and Keycloak local runtime baseline
description: Create the minimal local runtime baseline with Docker Compose, Caddy local TLS routing, Postgres, and Keycloak for the new project. Include a dedicated OpenTofu compose service for local infrastructure/config application, and keep OpenTofu state in a persistent compose volume rather than in git.
design: Compose remains the local runtime entrypoint, but now also hosts a dedicated OpenTofu service so infra/config changes run inside the stack. The OpenTofu working/state data must persist via a named compose volume and must not be committed to the repository.
notes: Verified runtime reachability from host: home.localhost:8088 returns 200, keycloak.localhost:8088 returns 302 to /admin/, and the browser can open both. localhost:8088 itself is not configured in Caddy, so bare localhost falls through to Caddy default behavior and appears broken; the remaining issue is hostname mismatch rather than container or port health.

title: Scaffold monorepo workspaces
description: Set up the minimal pnpm workspace monorepo structure, shared TypeScript base config, and app/package folders for auth-sandbox-2.

title: Fix form field id/name warnings
description: Add missing id/name attributes to frontend form fields so Chrome DevTools no longer reports non-blocking form field issues during manual verification.

title: Clean generated Keycloak extension artifacts from git worktree
description: Remove generated Keycloak extension build artifacts from the worktree and ensure .class/.jar outputs are not tracked in git.

title: Add inline favicons to web apps
description: Track the existing favicon link updates in the web app index files and commit them separately from the login recovery fix.

title: Optional: capture Caddy/proxy traffic for observability
description: Evaluate and, if worthwhile, implement proxy-layer capture from Caddy or adjacent reverse-proxy components as an additional observability source. Keep this separate so the core trace explorer can ship without proxy capture if integration cost is too high.
notes: This remains intentionally open as optional follow-up work; core observability functionality can ship without proxy-layer capture.
close_reason: Completed with implemented and verified optional Caddy/proxy capture support.

title: Dokumentation, Tests und Runtime-Wiring fuer Observability bereinigen
description: Bereinige README, Setup-Dokumentation, Tests, Beispielkonfigurationen und sonstiges Runtime-Wiring, damit keine veralteten Observability-Einstiegspunkte, Annahmen oder Testabhaengigkeiten fuer Grafana/Tempo/Collector mehr verbleiben.

title: Version everything in git with milestone commits
description: Track the expectation that all implementation artifacts for auth-sandbox-2 remain versioned in git and that work should be grouped into regular milestone commits during implementation. This issue is for documenting and following the repository workflow, not for pushing to a remote.

title: Document and surface observability entrypoints
description: Extend README/SETUP and the lightweight homepage as needed so local users can find the observability UI, understand what is traced, and use trace or request identifiers during the demo. Keep docs and landing-page content aligned with the actual stack.
close_reason: Durch neuen Rueckbau-/Cleanup-Plan fuer Observability ueberholt.

title: Add Keycloak trace and log correlation hooks
description: Make Keycloak observable enough for the local demo by forwarding or enriching logs and enabling trace correlation where feasible without over-engineering. Focus on correlating auth-api and browser activity with Keycloak requests and failures, and explicitly document any limits if full tracing is not realistic.
close_reason: Durch neuen Rueckbau-/Cleanup-Plan fuer Observability ueberholt.

title: Add browser tracing for app-web/admin-web flows
description: If practical for the minimal demo stack, instrument the React frontends with browser tracing so key user actions and API calls connect into backend traces. Keep it focused on the main registration, login, refresh, and logout flows rather than broad analytics.
close_reason: Durch neuen Rueckbau-/Cleanup-Plan fuer Observability ueberholt.

title: tmp connectivity probe
description: temporary probe
close_reason: Temporary connectivity probe during local beads recovery.

title: TEMP_DUPLICATE_GUARD_RESEARCH
close_reason: Obsolete or already satisfied by current repo state

title: TEMP_DUPLICATE_GUARD
close_reason: Obsolete or already satisfied by current repo state

title: TEMP_SHOULD_NOT_RUN
close_reason: Obsolete or already satisfied by current repo state

value: Ignore .beads/dolt-monitor.pid.lock as a local runtime lockfile; do not track it in git.
